title: OSU EECS Graduation Celebration — Gill Coliseum 2025-06-13
html:
OSU EECS Graduation Celebration confirmation email — June 13, 2025, 3:00 PM PDT, Gill Coliseum, doors at 2pm. Yahir's CS-degree wrap-up event; livestream + parking info on the EECS bit.ly. Sits in his graduation-2025 cluster alongside 2025 06 17 resume 2025 updates.

osu · cs coursework
